part.text:
---
## Goal
- Add `useEventLogger bool` parameter with default `false` to audit factory functions across the Vault repository to enable event logging control for all audit backend types

## Constraints & Preferences
- Change must be applied everywhere, not just in one location
- "The task is complete when the change is applied everywhere and the project still typechecks"
- Preserve backward compatibility through default parameter values

## Progress
### Done
- Added `useEventLogger bool` (default: false) to `NewAuditFormatter(useEventLogger bool, salter Salter)` in `/vault/audit/format.go`
- Updated all callers of `NewAuditFormatter` via signature change (9 packages)
- Added `useEventLogger bool` (default: false) to `NewAuditFormatterWriter(useEventLogger bool, formatter Formatter, writer Writer)` in `/vault/audit/format.go`
- Updated all callers of `NewAuditFormatterWriter` via signature change (5 production files)
- Modified audit backend types that use these functions: file, socket, syslog backends

### In Progress
- Remaining test helper functions like `NoopAuditFactory()` need to be updated with the new parameter
- Test files importing audit functions may need explicit passing of `false` for useEventLogger
- Verify typecheck passes after all changes

### Blocked
- None identified

## Key Decisions
- Used signature change operation (`set_signature`) which automatically updates all caller sites across packages
- Chose to make the parameter first with default value to maintain backward compatibility
- Applied changes in `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit` package before propagating to dependent packages

## Next Steps
1. Update remaining production code that directly creates audit formatters without using the factory functions
2. Update test helper functions (corehelpers, teststorage) to include useEventLogger parameter with appropriate defaults for their test scenarios
3. Add documentation or comments explaining the purpose of the useEventLogger flag if any exists
4. Run `go vet` and `go build` across all packages to verify typecheck compliance

## Critical Context
- Functions modified: `NewAuditFormatter`, `NewAuditFormatterWriter`
- Files updated by signature operations span 9+ packages including audit, builtin/audit/*, helper/*testhelpers/, internal/observability
- Test files reference these functions extensively (e.g., vault/http/sys_generate_root_test.go, vault/vault/audit_test.go)
- Some files show references to Noop* functions that may also need this parameter

## Relevant Files
- `/vault/audit/format.go`: Main audit formatter factory implementations
- `/vault/builtin/audit/file/backend.go`: File audit backend using NewAuditFormatterWriter
- `/vault/builtin/audit/socket/backend.go`: Socket audit backend using NewAuditFormatterWriter
- `/vault/builtin/audit/syslog/backend.go`: Syslog audit backend using NewAuditFormatterWriter
- `/vault/helper/testhelpers/corehelpers/corehelpers.go`: Test helper functions (Noop* factories)
- `/vault/internal/observability/event/node_formatter_audit_json.go`: Event node implementation
